author: y4rr
content: Surfaced by C7.3 conformance suite (conformance_jit_optimize_codegen.rs). constant_fold replaces the op node with a Constant result but leaves the source constant nodes as orphans. A subsequent DCE pass is required to remove them. The full optimize() pipeline does run DCE after folding, so end-users of optimize() are unaffected. However, callers who invoke constant_fold() directly get a graph with dangling constant nodes that inflate node_count. The fix is either to auto-chain DCE inside constant_fold or document that constant_fold does not guarantee minimal node count. Ref: opt_constant_fold_add_two_constants, opt_constant_fold_neg, opt_constant_fold_relu, opt_constant_fold_chain_add_then_mul conformance tests.
